strengths: Direct stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and Docker across multiple senior roles at Optilyz and re:cinq
Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq matches the explicit AI agent development requirement
15+ years of full-stack breadth including backend performance, cloud (AWS CDK), and developer tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin is listed as a secondary requirement but absent from the skills section and work history
React usage appears limited to supporting roles (pricing UI at Optilyz) rather than deep frontend ownership
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match on the fundamentals: deep TypeScript and Node.js experience, production-level cloud and containerization work, a clear TDD and craftsmanship ethos, and hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling at his current role. The primary gap is Nest.js, which is the listed backend framework; however, his architecture experience and NestJS's proximity to patterns he has used (Express-style Node, DI frameworks) make this learnable quickly. The absence of Kotlin is a minor concern given it is listed as secondary. Overall, his seniority, stack overlap, and AI tooling work make him a competitive candidate for this role.
